activeDG.title: Fix critico resolveImportPath: extension substitution para TypeScript ESM imports (.js→.ts/.tsx/.jsx, .mjs→.mts, .cjs→.cts, .jsx→.tsx)
activeDG.root_cause_identified_baseline_8c: resolveImportPath pre-fix trataba extensiones como sufijos aditivos: `foo.js` + `.ts` = `foo.js.ts` (inexistente) en vez de sustituir `foo.js` → `foo.ts`. Efecto: 100% de imports TypeScript ESM devolvian null en SENTINEL Baseline-8c → imports=0 importedBy=0 para todos los findings → cascada a role=entry via inferRole:504
activeDG.option_selected: Opción A (Conservative surgical) — EXTENSION_SUBSTITUTES table + 3 tests fixture-based
activeDG.baseline_8d_acceptance: install step10.vsix + re-scan SENTINEL + re-triage → telemetria enriched debe mostrar imports > 0 (colony-db.ts esperado 5-10, cli-runner.ts 3-5, detectors.ts 2-4) + importedBy > 0 (colony-db.ts esperado 5-10+) + role='library' para files con importedByCount >= 2. Rationales del LLM: si citan interacciones (imported by/exports/entry/library) → H3-rich → DG-124 A release v0.3.17. Si NO citan aun con data rica → H1-rich → DG-123.0.3 prompt strengthening
